scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.admin
scopes.description: Full system access including admin tile configuration

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.manage
scopes.description: Create, edit and delete bridges and restrictions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.view
scopes.description: Read-only access to bridges and restrictions

role-templates.name: BMS_ADMIN
role-templates.description: Full system access including admin tile

role-templates.name: BMS_MANAGER
role-templates.description: Create and manage bridges and restrictions — no admin tile

role-collections.name: BMS Administrator
role-collections.description: Full BMS system access including admin configuration tile

role-collections.name: BMS Manager
role-collections.description: Create and manage bridges and restrictions

role-collections.name: BMS Viewer
role-collections.description: Read-only access to bridges and restrictions
